positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical illustration featuring entwined lunar phases, stylized bioluminescent flora, and geometric constellations. The composition must be centrally focused and suitable for a t-shirt print, utilizing strong, crisp silhouettes and clean line work. Use a limited, deep color palette of indigo, dusty rose, gold foil accents, and cream white. Style the art as sophisticated mid-century modern vector illustration mixed with Art Nouveau detailing, emphasizing high contrast and flat color blocks. The overall feel should be mystical, elegant, and graphically strong. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, words, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, noisy, low detail, blurry, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, messy
